videos.headline: Roydell Williams powers in for first FSU TD of game
videos.description: Roydell Williams fights through a dogpile for 4-yard touchdown, giving FSU their first touchdown of the game

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Roydell Williams powers in for first FSU TD of game) 2024/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Memphis forces early fumble vs. FSU
videos.description: Chandler Martin recovers Roydell Williams' fumble after an 8-yard loss, giving Memphis an early advantage.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Memphis forces early fumble vs. FSU) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tahj Ra-El snags an INT for Memphis
videos.description: Tahj Ra-El picks off an FSU pass, returning possession of the ball back to Memphis before end of first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tahj Ra-El snags an INT for Memphis) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Greg Desrosiers Jr. catches and rolls in for Memphis' first TD
videos.description: Greg Desrosiers Jr. hauls in a 6-yard touchdown reception, putting Memphis ahead 10-0 over Florida State.

videos.headline: Anthony Landphere collects simple catch for a Memphis TD
videos.description: Anthony Landphere catches a flawless throw from Seth Henigan, stretching Memphis' lead to 20-3 over Florida State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Anthony Landphere collects simple catch for a Memphis TD) 2024/09/14 ESHEET

videos.headline: Malik Benson snags career-long 67-yard catch for FSU
videos.description: Malik Benson goes deep for a career-long 67-yard reception for FSU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Malik Benson snags career-long 67-yard catch for FSU) 2024/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Florida State falls to 0-3 after Hail Mary attempt falls short
videos.description: Julian Barnett swats away Florida State's Hail Mary as Memphis sends the Seminoles to 0-3 on the season.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Florida State falls to 0-3 after Hail Mary attempt falls short) 2024/09/14 ESHEET
